description: Person who answered is not the lead. Call Outcome wrong_person, Caller Name Confirmed false.
transcript:
Agent: Hello, am I speaking with Suresh?
Caller: No, this is his brother. Suresh doesn't live here anymore, this is my phone now.
Agent: Apologies for the confusion. Are you yourself looking for property?
Caller: No, not interested. Please update your records.
Agent: Will do, thank you.

Call Outcome.subjective: Reached the lead's brother; number reassigned.

Caller Name Confirmed.reasoning_objective: Respondent stated they are not the named lead.
